# ZEROVECTOR

> 鏈上資產，我們守護 | Blockchain Asset Protection | 链上资产，我们守护

ZEROVECTOR is a Hong Kong-based blockchain security and crypto asset recovery company. We provide professional on-chain forensics, crypto asset tracing, law enforcement technical support, and judicial forensics services across the Asia-Pacific region and globally.

## Services

- **Crypto Asset Recovery**: On-chain tracing, fund flow mapping, exchange cooperation for asset freezing. We have successfully identified and attributed multiple APT-level professional hacker groups, with cumulative recovery exceeding $1 billion USD.
- **Law Enforcement Technical Support**: On-chain behavioral profiling, asset attribution, transaction graph analysis for police and judicial bodies.
- **Virtual Currency Judicial Forensics (虛擬貨幣司法取證)**: Digital evidence preservation, expert forensic reports, court witness testimony.

## Products

- **Sealr**: iOS wallet monitoring and security alert application. Real-time on-chain activity alerts for digital asset holders.
- **ZeroVector CTIS (Crypto Threat Intelligence System)**: Professional crypto threat intelligence platform for enterprise and institutional clients.
- **CryptoThreat Intelligence**: AI-powered threat intelligence service for blockchain security analysis.

## Key Facts

- Jurisdiction: Hong Kong Special Administrative Region
- Strategic position: International financial center serving Asia-Pacific and global clients
- Contact: support@zerovector.hk
- Website: https://zerovector.hk
- Case submission: https://zerovector.hk/report.html
- X (Twitter): @ZEROVECTORhk

## Languages

This website is available in Traditional Chinese (zh-TW, default), Simplified Chinese (zh-CN), and English (en).

## Use Cases We Handle

- Cryptocurrency theft and fraud recovery
- Exchange hack investigation
- NFT fraud tracing
- DeFi exploit forensics
- Ransomware crypto tracing
- Money laundering via crypto investigation
- Cross-chain asset tracing

## How to Engage

Individuals or institutions who have suffered crypto asset theft can submit a case at https://zerovector.hk/report.html. Initial case assessments are free of charge.
